items.name: flowvault
items.description: Privacy-first notepad: Argon2id + AES-256-GCM, hidden-volume plausible deniability (N notebooks per URL), optimistic concurrency, dead-man's switch, drand/tlock time-locked notes, and one-shot encrypted send. Next.js frontend, Firebase Functions, auditable Firestore rules. MIT.

Combines momentum signals (RSI, MACD, VWAP), derivatives data (funding, OI, liquidations), and CLOB order-book imbalance into an EV-filtered, half-Kelly-sized strategy. Next.js dashboard with real-time analytics and Telegram alerts.

items.name: Discord-Bot
items.description: This project is a Discord bot built with Node.js that enables users to query item-based data through simple commands. Users provide an item name as input, and the bot processes the request to return relevant results associated with that item. These results may include variations, categories, or related options depending on the available dataset.

items.name: contentCrew-AI
items.description: ContentCrew AI is an end-to-end Agentic AI system that transforms a single prompt into high-quality, structured content through collaborative AI agents.  Instead of relying on a single LLM response, it orchestrates a team of specialized agents — just like a real content team.
